name: Rapac Communication & Infrastructure Ltd
summary: Rapac Communication & Infrastructure Ltd engages in telecom, government, and energy and infrastructure businesses in Israel. The company distributes communication and IT products; and workstations, laptops, servers, and storage solutions, as well as designs, setups, and maintains IoT solutions. It also markets communication, missile, avionics, navigation, microwave, and other defense systems, as well as provides consultancy, representation, distribution, program management, system integration, business development, engineering/technical support, entrepreneurship, and other support services for the defense community. In addition, the company offers solutions for power generation, transmission, and distribution, as well as for domestic, industrial, and government sectors; and manufactures electrical boards, as well as control systems and instrumentation, organic HV and LV teams, and lighting poles for light and heavy industry, food and pharmaceutical industry, communications and high-tech market, public structures, civil infrastructures, and streets lighting. Further, it operates and manages infrastructure and energy projects; and three power generation plants, as well as gas turbines and PV projects. The company was formerly known as RAPAC Electronics Ltd. Rapac Communication & Infrastructure Ltd. was founded in 1964 and is based in Kfar Netter, Israel.
